steps: Log in to your Salesforce org at https://login.salesforce.com
Click the gear icon in the top-right and select 'Setup'
In the Setup search bar, type 'App Manager' and click 'App Manager' under Apps
Click 'New Connected App' in the top-right corner
Fill in 'Connected App Name', 'API Name', and 'Contact Email'
Enter a Callback URL (e.g., https://localhost/callback or your app's redirect URI)
Add the required OAuth scopes (e.g., 'Full access (full)' or 'API (api)')
After saving, click 'Manage Consumer Details' (may require re-authentication)

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Consumer Key (Client ID)
credential_fields.description: The Consumer Key from your Salesforce Connected App's OAuth settings.

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Consumer Secret (Client Secret)
credential_fields.description: The Consumer Secret from your Salesforce Connected App's OAuth settings.

notes: A Salesforce Developer Edition org (free) can be created at https://developer.salesforce.com/signup
The Connected App may take up to 10 minutes to become active after creation
The base_url varies per org instance (e.g., https://yourorg.my.salesforce.com)
OAuth token URL: https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token (use https://test.salesforce.com for sandbox)
The 'instance_url' returned in the OAuth token response must be used as the API base URL
Scopes needed for full API access: 'api', 'refresh_token', 'offline_access'
